title: Network Proxy
description: A Minecraft mod with support for HTTP/SOCKS5 proxies and per-server proxy configuration.
body:
A Minecraft mod with support for HTTP/SOCKS5 proxies and per-server proxy configuration.

Features:
- support HTTP/SOCKS5
- support server whitelist (only the servers on the whitelist can use the proxy; all other servers should bypass the proxy connection)

---

一个支持http/sock5代理并支持指定服务器代理的mod

功能:
- 支持HTTP/SOCKS5
- 支持设定服务器白名单 (仅白名单内的服务器可以使用代理，其他的服务器均跳过代理连接)
